Kannialazhann Farm & KSK Farm - AI content summary

Main site pages:
- / : Home page for native livestock in Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
- /areas-we-serve : Delivery areas page listing service coverage across Tamil Nadu and Kerala.
- /category/cows : Dairy cows category with HF cows and farm delivery.
- /category/goats : Goat category with Sembari and native goats for meat, breeding, and function orders.
- /category/dogs : Native dog breeds category (Rajapalayam, Kanni, Chippiparai, Kombai).
- /category/poultry : Poultry category with Naatu Koli, Red Sonali, and Sanda Koli.
- /category/eggs : Farm eggs category with fresh daily free-range eggs.

Primary keywords:
- farm animal delivery Tamil Nadu Kerala
- Rajapalayam dogs, Kanni dogs, Chippiparai, Kombai
- Sembari goat sale Tamil Nadu Kerala
- HF dairy cow delivery
- Naatu Koli country chicken
- fresh farm eggs delivery
- native livestock farm Rajapalayam

AEO direct answer snippets are stored in category and animal data for fast answer retrieval.
